name: textfx
description: TextFX v5 — AI Creative Director (Windows Installer)

scripts.bootstrap: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "npm install; Push-Location backend; npm install; Pop-Location; Push-Location app; npm install; Pop-Location; Push-Location electron-src; npm install; Pop-Location"
scripts.build:backend: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Push-Location backend; npx tsc -p tsconfig.json; npx pkg dist/index.js --targets node18-win-x64 --output ../release/backend/fx-server.exe --config pkg.config.json; Pop-Location"
scripts.build:app: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Push-Location app; npm run build; Pop-Location"
scripts.build:electron: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Push-Location electron-src; npx tsc -p tsconfig-electron.json; Pop-Location"
scripts.dist: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "npm run build:backend; npm run build:app; npm run build:electron; npx electron-builder --win --x64"
